# plugin-pyramid

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Interactive pyramid composer on the public site's Platform page: the visitor toggles plugin blocks on/off and watches a sample app's regions appear or empty into labelled slots, with the top tier showing the release targets the one composition ships to — the plugins → apps → releases architecture made visible.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `WebsitePlatform.Section` "Pyramid demo" → `PluginPyramidSection`
  - Uses: `apps/website/pillars/platform.WebsitePlatform`, `apps/website/shell.landingPane`, `primitives/css/badge.Badge`, `primitives/css/card.Card`, `primitives/css/center.Center`, `primitives/css/cluster.Cluster`, `primitives/css/spacing.Inset`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/surface.Surface`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/css/toggle-chip.ToggleChip`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.Button`, `primitives/pane.useOpenPane`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
